Uses of Class
neqsim.thermo.system.FluidBuilder

Packages that use FluidBuilder
Package
Description
neqsim.thermo.system
 

  • Uses of FluidBuilder in neqsim.thermo.system

    Methods in neqsim.thermo.system that return FluidBuilder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.addComponent(String name, double moleFraction)
    Adds a component with a mole fraction.
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.addPlusFraction(String name, double moleFraction, double molarMassKgPerMol, double density)
    Adds a plus fraction (e.g., C20+) for oil characterization.
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.addTBPFraction(String name, double moleFraction, double molarMassKgPerMol, double density)
    Adds a TBP (True Boiling Point) fraction for oil characterization.
    static FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.create(double temperatureK, double pressureBara)
    Creates a new fluent builder for a thermodynamic fluid.
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.withEOS(FluidBuilder.EOSType eosType)
    Selects the equation of state type.
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.withLumpedComponents(int numberOfLumpedComponents)
    Sets the number of lumped components for C7+ characterization.
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.withMixingRule(int mixingRuleNumber)
    Sets the mixing rule by number (e.g., 10 for CPA).
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.withMixingRule(String mixingRule)
    Sets the mixing rule by name (e.g., "classic", "HV", "WS").
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.withMultiPhaseCheck()
    Enables multi-phase check (needed for water-bearing systems).
    FluidBuilder
    FluidBuilder.withSolidPhaseCheck()
    Enables solid phase check (for wax, hydrate, or solid precipitation).
